groove_from.desc: rolling 6/8 maloya pulse, kayamb shaker, roulèr bass drum, call-and-response feel

harmony_from.desc: minor pentatonic blues phrasing, bent notes, TB-303 acid bassline as the harmonic spine

production: raw, hypnotic, lightly lo-fi, tape saturation, live-room feel
tension: the 303 squelch fighting the acoustic maloya percussion; sacred trance meeting electronic acid
avoid: clean EDM gloss, quantized rigidity, festival drop

groove_from.desc: deep one-drop bass, spacious off-beat skank, spring reverb and tape-echo throws

harmony_from.desc: minor-key saudade melody, Portuguese guitarra twelve-string ornaments, rubato melancholy

production: cavernous, echo-drenched, analog, lots of negative space
tension: the intimacy of a fado vocal against the vast empty space of dub; longing pulled through echo
avoid: busy arrangement, bright EDM, fast tempo

groove_from.desc: 160 bpm stuttering triplet kick patterns, chopped vocal stabs, rapid hi-hat rolls

harmony_from.desc: monophonic modal Latin plainchant, no harmony, free-floating sacred melody

production: stark contrast: wet cathedral reverb on the chant, dry punchy drums underneath
tempo_feel: 160 bpm footwork, the chant floating half-time over it
tension: timeless sacred monody versus hyper-kinetic Chicago footwork; eternity against the stutter
avoid: cheesy trance pads, four-on-the-floor, literal church organ
